_note: Hotel + venue information. Key entries by 'jakarta-main' or similar to match delegates.hotel_id.

jakarta-hotel.name: ARTOTEL Thamrin - Jakarta
jakarta-hotel.subtitle: Delegate accommodation
jakarta-hotel.description: Your accommodation for YPDS Jakarta 2026. An art-led hotel in Menteng, walking distance from Thamrin and the summit venues.
highlights: Art-themed rooms, each by an Indonesian artist
Central Menteng location, close to the summit venues
jakarta-hotel.address: Jl. Sunda No.3, RT.8/RW.4, Gondangdia, Kec. Menteng, Kota Jakarta Pusat, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta 10350, Indonesia
policy: All bookings are made by CSCD on your behalf — you do not need to book a room yourself.
If you need to extend your dates, coordinate with us in advance and we will arrange it.
Room allocation and dates may be adjusted by the management in line with the institutional visit schedule.

jakarta-main.name: Tugu Kunstkring Paleis
jakarta-main.subtitle: Historic Cultural Venue & Restaurant
jakarta-main.description: An iconic historical building serving as a venue for dining and cultural experiences. Home to the Kunstkring Paleis (Art Circle Palace), this architectural gem combines Jakarta's rich heritage with contemporary hospitality.
highlights: Cultural ambiance ideal for diplomatic gatherings
